vocab.meaning: giảm bớt sự đơn điệu/nhàm chán
vocab.example: To mitigate the monotony of standing still for an hour, I usually dive into a thought-provoking podcast.

vocab.meaning: thời gian chết không hiệu quả
vocab.example: I try to transform that unproductive downtime into a language-learning session by practicing my listening skills.

vocab.meaning: tiếng còi xe inh ỏi/loạn xạ
vocab.example: I put on my noise-canceling headphones to drown out the frantic honking of impatient drivers around me.

vocab.meaning: dòng chảy giao thông thất thường
vocab.example: Managing my temper during an erratic traffic flow is easier when I have a soothing lo-fi playlist running.

vocab.meaning: giữ cái đầu lạnh/giữ bình tĩnh
vocab.example: It's crucial to keep a level head when you're late for a meeting due to an unexpected bottleneck.
I always incorporate some buffer time into my schedule so that a congestion doesn't cause me to panic.

vocab.meaning: xoay xở trong tình trạng đình trệ/đứng yên
vocab.example: There is little you can do to navigate the standstill, so I focus on planning my evening meals instead.
I use the time to practice mindfulness, seeking some inner tranquility amidst the chaotic fumes and noise.
To escape the stifling atmosphere of a jam-packed street, I often roll up the windows and turn on the climate control.

vocab.meaning: tận dụng một cách tối ưu
vocab.example: I attempt to optimally utilize the delay by making hands-free calls to check in on my family members.
